title: Warp Stone
description: A simple system of fast travel.
body:
# Warp Stone

![An image of a warp stone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/001b8a6f637bc6653dff476b958f5bcae3a546c2_0.webp)

---

This datapack (or mod) adds craftable warp stones, which can be used to teleport to locations you've been before. This was made to make a _slightly_ less cheaty feeling alternative to the home plugins you'll find on some servers.

---

To bind a location to a warp stone, right click. after that, any additional right clicks will teleport you back to the stone's bound location. To clear the stone's location, sneak and right click.

---
## Crafting
![The crafting recipe for a warp stone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dfccc75884613955cde0e3fe6226dbd5d27601fd.png)
